name: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 purchase orders/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 purchase orders/month, delayed approvals cause missed deadlines. We send timely reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 purchase orders/month
